Like Oguri Cap and many before her, the winner of today's 
Arima Kinen will emerge as a newly crowned legend.

As today's favorite to win, will Mejiro McQueen join their 
ranks? Or will it be one of her hardened rivals?

The cheers from the crowd fan flames in their hearts as the 
runners tear past the stands!

Everyone's cheers… Their cries of support… It all serves to 
push me ever forward.

Incredible stuff as always, McQueen. Just like at the spring 
Tenno Sho… Scratch that, she's even better now.

Nothing within me has truly changed, but… I most certainly 
have learned to turn expectations into strength.

The runners emerge from the fourth corner onto the 
homestretch! 300 meters separate the leader and the 
Grand Prix title!

Thank you for sharing your strength, everyone. I can surely 
win!

Mejiro McQueen makes her final spurt! She outpaces her 
rivals one by one!

Third place, second! They say her strength can't be beat! Is 
that true?!

But she's not alone! Another runner hurtles from the inside! 
She's gaining — she's neck and neck! Who will be 
victorious?!
